samples.xml_description:
<module id="width_8to16">
    <description>Converts 8-bit data input to 16-bit data output.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="valid_in">Input signal indicating the validity of the input data.</input>
        <input id="data_in" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input data.</input>
        <output id="valid_out">Output signal indicating the validity of the output data.</output>
        <output id="data_out" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="flag">Flag signal for controlling data output.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="data_lock" width_description="[7:0]">Register for temporarily storing the first valid input data.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="flag">Flag signal for controlling data output.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <when test="&rst_n">
            <block>
                <case test="&valid_in">
                    <statement test="!flag">data_out <= {data_lock, data_in};</statement>
                    <statement test="flag">valid_out <= 1'b1;</statement>
                </case>
                <case test="&valid_in">
                    <statement test="!flag">flag <= 1'b1;</statement>
                    <statement test="flag">flag <= 1'b0;</statement>
                </case>
                <case test="!&valid_in">
                    <statement test="flag">valid_out <= 1'b1;</statement>
                </case>
            </block>
        </when>
        <else>
            <block>
                <case test="!flag">
                    <statement test="!valid_in">data_out <= 16'd0;</statement>
                </case>
                <case test="flag">
                    <statement test="!valid_in">valid_out <= 1'b0;</statement>
                </case>
            </block>
        </else>
    </implementation>
</module>
